headline: FAN FAVORITE
title: The prompt library the internet built.
subtitle: With 150K+ GitHub stars, Prompts.chat is where developers, writers, and AI power users come to find the perfect words — open source, self-hostable, and free forever.

headline: JUST SHIPPED
title: Speak freely. Let your Mac follow.
subtitle: Textream tracks every word you say in real time, scrolling your script as you speak — all processed on-device, tucked inside a stunning Dynamic Island overlay.

headline: RISING STAR
title: Your Mac's vitals, always at a glance.
subtitle: DodoPulse tucks gorgeous real-time graphs for CPU, memory, GPU, and network right into your menu bar — lightweight, native Swift, and surprisingly beautiful.

headline: TRENDING
title: X-ray vision for your Hono API.
subtitle: Drop one middleware into your Hono app and instantly get a real-time dashboard for requests, exceptions, logs, and database queries — zero config, full clarity.
